     The Numbers Business Report

Halloween Ends (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $64,079,860Details
International Box Office $41,320,936
Worldwide Box Office $105,400,796
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,354,236
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,445,973
Total $7,800,209
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Four years after the events of last year’s Halloween Kills, Laurie is living with her granddaughter Allyson and is finishing writing her memoir. Michael Myers hasn’t been seen since. Laurie, after allowing the specter of Michael to determine and drive her reality for decades, has decided to liberate herself from fear and rage and embrace life. But when a young man, Corey Cunningham, is accused of killing a boy he was babysitting, it ignites a cascade of violence and terror that will force Laurie to finally confront the evil she can’t control, once and for all.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$40,050,355 (62.5% of total gross)
Legs:1.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,901 opening theaters/3,901 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $72,782,066

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 14th, 2022 (Wide) by Universal
October 14th, 2022 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: October 12th, 2022 (Wide) (Philippines)
October 12th, 2022 (Wide) (Indonesia)
October 12th, 2022 (Wide) (Egypt)
October 12th, 2022 (Wide) (Switzerland)
October 12th, 2022 (Wide) (Belgium)
Video Release: October 14th, 2022 by Peacock
MPA Rating: R for bloody horror violence and gore, language throughout and some sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2744 (cert #53986), 8/10/2022)
Running Time: 111 minutes
Franchise: Halloween
Release detail: Early / Simultaneous Video-on-Demand release
Social setting: Halloween
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Miramax Films, Blumhouse, Malek Akkad, Rough House Pictures, Trancas International Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Four years after the events of last year’s Halloween Kills, Laurie is living with her granddaughter Allyson and is finishing writing her memoir. Michael Myers hasn’t been seen since. Laurie, after allowing the specter of Michael to determine and drive her reality for decades, has decided to liberate herself from fear and rage and embrace life. But when a young man, Corey Cunningham, is accused of killing a boy he was babysitting, it ignites a cascade of violence and terror that will force Laurie to finally confront the evil she can’t control, once and for all.
